ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the bus stop */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction responsible for the bus stop */,
  "shelter" INTEGER /* Indicates whether there is a shelter */,
  "bench" INTEGER /* Indicates availability of a bench */,
  "trash_can" INTEGER /* Indicates availability of a trash can */,
  "bus_bay" INTEGER /* Indicates if a bus bay is present at stop */,
  "bike_rack" INTEGER /* Indicates availability of a bike rack */,
  "water_fountain" INTEGER /* Indicates availability of a water fountain */,
  "public_art" INTEGER /* Indicates presence of public art */,
  "ada_compliant" INTEGER /* ADA compliance status */,
  "bathroom" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a bathroom available */,
  "lighting" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lighting is sufficient */,
  "info_display" INTEGER /* Indicates if an information display is available */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* The last updated timestamp for the stop information */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bus stop was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of last inspection of the bus stop */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of next scheduled inspection of the bus stop */,
  "condition_rating" INTEGER /* Condition rating of the bus stop (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus route */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the route (e.g., Northbound, Southbound) */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., local, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_routes" (
  "stop_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stop-route association */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated bus route */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop along the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_routes_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_routes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop requiring maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the maintenance issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance issue was resolved */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, maintainer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the bus stop (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop related to the photo */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the photo was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop related to the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_bays" (
  "bay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus bay */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated bus stop */,
  "bay_number" INTEGER /* Bay number for organization */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bay (number of buses it can accommodate) */,
  "bay_type" TEXT /* Type of bus bay (e.g., standard, handicapped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_bays_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking_data" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tracking data entry */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop associated with the tracking data */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bus stop location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bus stop location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tracking data was recorded */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the bus at the time of tracking */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the bus at the time of tracking (in degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_data_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus stop with the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., Wi-Fi, power outlets) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_features_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)
